description: CMR email reply — check inbox and reply to new emails
action: Run the cmr-email-reply skill: fetch unread emails from the CMR inbox and save draft replies for any new customer emails using the knowledge base.

description: Weekly CMR Facebook Ads report - every Monday at 8am
action: Run the Facebook Ads analysis for the last 7 days using the analyze-cmr-ads skill (run_analysis.py --last-7-days), then send the results by email to diegoolalde@gmail.com. Follow the report template exactly: MoM tables (LLAMADAS and MENSAJERIA separately), Anuncios a Reemplazar, Mejores Creativos del Periodo, and 3 Acciones. Write in Spanish. Use only plain hyphens (no em dashes or special characters) in the email subject and body to avoid encoding issues. Do not include emojis in headings.

description: Monthly CMR Facebook Ads report - 1st of every month at 8am
action: Run the Facebook Ads analysis for the full previous calendar month using the analyze-cmr-ads skill. To get the date range, compute the first and last day of the previous month (e.g. if today is May 1, use --start-date 2026-04-01 --end-date 2026-04-30). Run: python3 scripts/run_analysis.py --start-date YYYY-MM-01 --end-date YYYY-MM-[last day] from /Users/cmrai/Agent/mateo/profile/skills/analyze-cmr-ads/. Then send the results by email to diegoolalde@gmail.com with subject "CMR Ads - Reporte Mensual [Month] [Year]". Follow the report template exactly: MoM tables (LLAMADAS and MENSAJERIA separately), Anuncios a Reemplazar, Mejores Creativos del Periodo, and 3 Acciones. Write in Spanish. Use only plain hyphens (no em dashes or special characters) in the email subject and body to avoid encoding issues. Do not include emojis in headings.
